case_title: HERBERT BARASCH VS. DELSON BARETTE ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARASCH, HERBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARETTE, DELSON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 559 VALENCIA STREET, #40, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, 94110, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARASCH, HERBERT AS TO DEFENDANT BARETTE, DELSON DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $23.57 FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARASCH, HERBERT
